archetype: Archetype 6: Vibrant Play (Youth Coaching & Education) adapted for Indian Heritage

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 (Generous padding for kid-friendly touch targets)
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat backgrounds, 2px solid border (border-slate-200), solid offset shadow (e.g., 4px 4px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)) for a tactile 'Neo-Brutalist/Storybook' feel.

components.buttons: Large touch targets (min-h-[56px]), highly saturated colors (Saffron or Green), rounded-full, explicit press states.
components.cards: White or Cream background, rounded-[24px], bold 2px border in a lighter tint of the accent or primary color. Inner padding p-6. Avoid generic centered text; use asymmetric 'bento' layouts for story cards.
components.bottom_tab_nav: Fixed bottom, high contrast icons, solid white background with a subtle top border, Saffron color for active tab indicator.
components.chat_bubbles: Azaadi's bubbles: Warm gold/cream background with deep navy text. Kid's bubbles: Saffron background with white text. Rounded-[20px] with one sharp corner indicating direction.
components.progress_bar: Thick (h-4 or h-6), rounded-full, vibrant animated fill (Saffron or Green).

animations.interactions: Bouncy scale effects on buttons. Smooth page transitions. No complex 3D rendering required, keep it flat and responsive.
animations.feedback: Particle burst or scale-in effects on quiz completion/level up.

assets.icons: lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone style for storybook feel).

images.description: Azaadi the Owl Companion (Use as placeholder for mascot portrait)
Two owls sitting on branch (Alternative Azaadi illustration for chat background)
Historical Indian fort (Use for story backgrounds and library header)
Magical castle (Use for onboarding or level up screens)
Gold medal for XP/Badges placeholder in Profile Screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Context: This is an Expo React Native Mobile App, NOT a web app. Translate these Tailwind-like utility descriptions into React Native styles (e.g., 'p-6' -> { padding: 24 }, 'rounded-[24px]' -> { borderRadius: 24 }). If using NativeWind, use valid Tailwind classes.
Testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'testID' attribute (e.g., testID='login-button').
Aesthetics: Avoid generic centered layouts and 'AI slop' (purple gradients). Use playful asymmetry, 'bento' grid-like layouts for story cards, and thick geometric borders.
Navigation: Implement a Bottom Tab Navigation (Home, Library, Azaadi, Profile).
Story Reader: Integrate TTS logic and place a prominent, kid-friendly 'Play' button. Include a 'Take Quiz' CTA at the end.
Use standard React Native components (<View>, <Text>, <TouchableOpacity>) to build custom storybook-style cards rather than relying on standard pre-built card libraries that look too 'corporate'.
